is an acute care hospital in [Brampton, Ontario](/wiki/Brampton,_Ontario "Brampton, Ontario") and part of the [William Osler Health System](/wiki/William_Osler_Health_System "William Osler Health System"). It is a community teaching hospital for the [Michael G. DeGroote School of Medicine](/wiki/Michael_G._DeGroote_School_of_Medicine "Michael G. DeGroote School of Medicine") of [McMaster University](/wiki/McMaster_University "McMaster University").

**Brampton Civic Hospital** is an acute care hospital in [Brampton, Ontario](/wiki/Brampton,_Ontario "Brampton, Ontario") and part of the [William Osler Health System](/wiki/William_Osler_Health_System "William Osler Health System"). It is a community teaching hospital for the [Michael G. DeGroote School of Medicine](/wiki/Michael_G._DeGroote_School_of_Medicine "Michael G. DeGroote School of Medicine") of [McMaster University](/wiki/McMaster_University "McMaster University").

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Brampton_Civic_Hospital&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

The 608-bed hospital[[1]](#cite_note-1) was designed by Parkin Architects Limited in joint venture with [Adamson Associates](/wiki/Adamson_Associates "Adamson Associates") and built by a joint venture of [Carillion](/wiki/Carillion "Carillion") and [EllisDon](/wiki/EllisDon "EllisDon").[[2]](#cite_note-2) The Brampton Civic Hospital is one of Canada's first public hospitals to be designed, built, financed, and maintained under a private-public partnership. It opened in 2007 and replaced the [Peel Memorial Hospital](/wiki/Peel_Memorial_Hospital "Peel Memorial Hospital") which previously served Brampton and the surrounding area.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

The south tower was named the Bikram S. Dhillon & Family South Tower in 2023, for donors.[[4]](#cite_note-4)

## Operations

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Brampton_Civic_Hospital&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Operations")]

Brampton Civic Hospital currently serves approximately 500,000 residents in Brampton and the surrounding areas. The facility can accommodate 80,000 emergency patient visits and 201,000 ambulatory care visits annually.[[5]](#cite_note-brampton-5) The hospital has 4,100 employees.[[5]](#cite_note-brampton-5)
